name: Dynamic Variable Evaluation
description: The product uses user-influenced variable names in dynamic evaluation constructs (like PHP's $$varname) without proper controls, allowing attackers to read or write arbitrary variables or invoke unintended functions at runtime.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user input that flows into a TRANSFORM node performing dynamic variable resolution (variable variables, eval-like constructs) without a CONTROL node enforcing an allowlist of permitted variable or function names.
